nasb.text: But we, going ahead to the ship, set sail for Assos, intending from there to take Paul on board; for so he had arranged it, intending himself to go by land.

esv.text: But going ahead to the ship, we set sail for Assos, intending to take Paul aboard there, for so he had arranged, intending himself to go by land.

cnv.text: 我們先上船，開往亞朔，照著保羅的安排，要在那邊接他，因為他自己要走陸路去。

ccb.text: 我们照保罗的吩咐先乘船到亚朔预备在那里接他，他打算由陆路步行到那里。

csbs.text: 我们先上船开往阿索，要在那里接保罗；原来他这样安排，是因为自己要走陆路。
